data.title: Startek wins 3 Comparably Awards for employee happiness, perks & benefits, and work-life balance in 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 16, 2025, Startek®, a leading global provider of digital-first customer experience solutions, was honored with three distinguished Comparably Awards. The accolades include being named the company with the Happiest Employees, the Best Perks & Benefits, and the Best Work-Life Balance. This recognition highlights Startek's commitment to creating a positive and fulfilling work environment for its workforce. These accolades underscore the company's dedication to employee satisfaction and well-being.

data.title: Independent study from Scintillation Research reveals ownership of HEVC standard essential patents to various stakeholders worldwide.
data.description: In Mohali, India on October 16, 2025, Scintillation Research released findings from their impartial study on HEVC technology. The study, not funded by any party, provides an in-depth report on the importance of HEVC for different groups. The report covers essential analysis on HEVC patents and their significance in various industries.

data.title: HomeServe in Norwalk earns Great Place To Work certification for the 10th year with a record high employee satisfaction score 23% above US average.
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - HomeServe has been certified as a Great Place To Work® for the 10th time, achieving a record high employee satisfaction score which is 23% higher than the national average in the United States.
Michelin reports trading of own shares on Oct 16, 2025.

data.title: Itafos Inc. partially monetizes equity in St George Mining Limited by selling 277,893,103 SGQ Shares for USD$18.3MM.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Itafos Inc. disclosed the partial monetization of its ownership stake in St George Mining Limited. Itafos sold 277,893,103 ordinary shares of St George between October 13-14, 2025, yielding total gross proceeds estimated at around USD$18.3 million, subject to fees, taxes, and current exchange rates. Additionally, on the same day, Itafos decided to exercise 86,111,025 options at a price of AUD$0.04 per share. This transaction was related to the sale of Itafos' Araxá project earlier in the year.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming sells shares worth $76.5 million to increase Ethereum holdings amid BitMine's growing treasury lead.
data.description: SharpLink Gaming, a company specializing in Ethereum treasury management, has revealed plans to initiate a share offering worth $76.5 million. This decision comes after a period of one month during which the company did not make any significant purchases of ETH.

data.title: NPG releases publication on US immigration policy failures, urges national conversation on population growth.
data.description: In a recent development, Negative Population Growth, Inc. (NPG) presented a new publication titled "Common Sense Immigration Policy in an Era of Theatrics," emphasizing the pressing need for a national dialogue on population growth. The report highlights flawed strategies and the escalating demand for proactive measures. Released in Alexandria, Virginia, on October 16, 2025, this publication underlines the importance of addressing this issue promptly. Through this release, NPG aims to draw attention to the critical situation and foster informed discussions. It underscores the necessity of reevaluating current policies and implementing effective solutions to mitigate the challenges associated with population growth.

data.title: Iain Twiddy joins Phantom Screens as distributor for Vancouver Island North under Island Screening Systems partnership.
data.description: Island Screening Systems, lead by Iain Twiddy, has partnered with Phantom Screens to become a distributor. The announcement was made in Abbotsford, BC on October 16, 2025. Twiddy will be the regional head for this partnership.

data.title: Disclosure of total voting rights and share capital as of September 30, 2025, in compliance with French Commercial Code and AMF regulations.
data.description: The combined total of voting rights and shares has been disclosed in accordance with article L. 233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the Regulation of the French stock market authority. This information indicates the overall voting rights and shares held by stakeholders within the market.

data.title: Vivakor to offer 8,417,645 shares and 14,689,851 warrants in $5M direct offering on Nasdaq by Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Vivakor, Inc. unveiled a securities purchase agreement with a prominent institutional investor for the acquisition of 8,417,645 shares of its common stock at $0.001 per share, along with 14,689,851 pre-funded warrants at the same price, in a registered direct offering conducted at the market value under Nasdaq rules. The transaction is slated to conclude on October 17, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.
